overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through Night City. The player character moves along a canal-side walkway, crosses intersections, and navigates through dense urban streets filled with neon signage, pedestrians, and vehicles under a mix of natural sunlight and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: passing the green military truck parked on the right side of the walkway
pedestrian in beige outfit walks past camera on the right, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the canal-side sidewalk, passing a parked military truck and approaching other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: green military truck parked on the side of the road
pedestrian in light-colored outfit walking toward camera

entered.detail: murky green water channel running parallel to the walkway
massive concrete highway structure casting shadows overhead
large armored transport vehicle with flatbed and green paint
black metal barrier separating walkway from the canal drop
large vertical advertisement with purple and yellow graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a canal-side walkway in Night City, with murky water visible to the left and a massive elevated highway overhead. The player passes a green military truck parked on the right while walking along the concrete sidewalk. Neon billboards and metal guardrails line the path as sparse pedestrians move through the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and seating area

events.description: approaching the intersection with visible crosswalk markings and steam vents
crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk at the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the intersection, navigating around pedestrians and parked vehicles toward the green hologram

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians sitting on a concrete bench beside the walkway
group of pedestrians gathered near the crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow lines painted on asphalt
public seating area with NPCs resting near the canal edge
large floating neon-green holographic display emitting light
ground vent emitting white steam or smoke into the air
line of futuristic vehicles parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a sunlit intersection, leaving the canal behind. A concrete bench with sitting NPCs appears on the left while steam rises from a vent in the center of the crossing. The player crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk toward a large green holographic advertisement, with parked cars lining the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with green carpet

events.description: entering the covered walkway with distinctive green carpet flooring after crossing the street
slight turn to navigate around pedestrian traffic on the narrow green path

agents.ego_description: walking along the green carpeted path under the highway overpass, passing other pedestrians and observing the neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket standing with arms crossed near the barrier
white van driving along the adjacent road behind yellow barriers

entered.detail: distinctive bright green carpeted pedestrian path under the highway
temporary yellow barriers separating walkway from vehicle traffic
massive support columns for the overpass creating a corridor effect
various illuminated shop signs on building facades including pink and blue neon

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the player enters a covered walkway with a distinctive green carpeted floor running beneath the elevated highway. Yellow construction barriers line the right side separating pedestrians from road traffic, while massive concrete support pillars create a corridor-like atmosphere. Neon store signs illuminate the left side as the player moves through moderate pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with dense signage and storefronts

events.description: passing a burning barrel with active flames on the left side of the walkway
approaching the next intersection with yellow traffic barriers visible ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow commercial street, passing the burning barrel and approaching the next crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: adult and child walking together ahead of camera along the sidewalk
pedestrian sitting on the ground near the burning barrel

entered.detail: metal barrel with active orange flames emitting black smoke
multi-story structures with balconies, air conditioning units, and dense signage
tall palm trees visible down the street adding vegetation to the urban scene
massive screen displaying advertisements on a distant building facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the player enters a narrow commercial street lined with dense multi-story buildings covered in neon signs and balconies. A burning barrel with active flames sits on the left sidewalk near a seated pedestrian. The street opens up ahead with palm trees visible in the distance and a large digital billboard dominating the skyline as the player approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with traffic barriers and crosswalks

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection, navigating around yellow barriers

agents.ego_description: crossing the final intersection, moving past yellow traffic barriers and turning slightly to follow the path while avoiding vehicles

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection past the camera

entered.detail: bright yellow barriers blocking part of the road and guiding pedestrian flow
marked pedestrian crossing area with white lines
green-painted commercial building at the street corner with multiple signs

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the final intersection, marked by bright yellow traffic barriers guiding the flow of pedestrians and vehicles. After crossing the street and passing a black SUV, the camera turns slightly left, revealing more of the dense urban commercial district with the large digital billboard now visible to the left as the walk continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate canal-side walkway into the dense, neon-lit heart of a commercial urban district. It begins along a concrete sidewalk beside murky water and a massive elevated highway, passing a parked military truck under the shadow of overhead structures. As the camera leaves the canal behind, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection where steam rises from street vents and the player crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a large green holographic advertisement. The path then shifts into a corridor-like covered walkway with green carpeting and massive concrete pillars before emerging onto a narrow commercial street lined with multi-story buildings, burning barrels, and glowing neon signs. Finally, the camera navigates through bright yellow traffic barriers and past a black SUV, turning slightly to reveal a sprawling cityscape dominated by a massive digital billboard.
